list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.description: Monitored SQL Server instance - one MSSQL datasource per instance. Type to search.

list.name: counter
list.label: Perfmon counter
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT RTRIM(counter_name) FROM collect.perfmon_stats WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()) ORDER BY 1;
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT RTRIM(counter_name) FROM collect.perfmon_stats WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()) ORDER BY 1;
list.description: Pick a counter for the Perfmon chart, or select 'All' to overlay every counter.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), cus.sample_time), cpu_pct = ISNULL(cus.total_cpu_utilization, cus.sqlserver_cpu_utilization) FROM collect.cpu_utilization_stats AS cus WHERE cus.sample_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND cus.sample_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY cus.sample_time;

WITH agg AS (
    SELECT
        ws.collection_time,
        total_wait_ms_delta = SUM(ws.wait_time_ms_delta)
    FROM collect.wait_stats AS ws
    WHERE ws.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ws.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY ws.collection_time
),
timed AS (
    SELECT
        collection_time,
        total_wait_ms_delta,
        interval_seconds = DATEDIFF(SECOND,
            LAG(collection_time) OVER (ORDER BY collection_time),
            collection_time)
    FROM agg
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), collection_time),
    wait_ms_sec = CONVERT(decimal(18,4), CAST(total_wait_ms_delta AS decimal(19,4)) / interval_seconds)
FROM timed
WHERE interval_seconds > 0
ORDER BY collection_time;

SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), bds.collection_time), blocking_events = SUM(bds.blocking_event_count_delta), deadlocks = SUM(bds.deadlock_count_delta) FROM collect.blocking_deadlock_stats AS bds WHERE bds.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND bds.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) GROUP BY bds.collection_time ORDER BY bds.collection_time;

SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ms.collection_time), buffer_pool_mb = ms.buffer_pool_mb FROM collect.memory_stats AS ms WHERE ms.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ms.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY ms.collection_time;

SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), fio.collection_time),
    avg_read_ms = SUM(fio.io_stall_read_ms_delta) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(fio.num_of_reads_delta), 0),
    avg_write_ms = SUM(fio.io_stall_write_ms_delta) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(fio.num_of_writes_delta), 0)
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
GROUP BY fio.collection_time
ORDER BY fio.collection_time;

WITH top_waits AS (
    SELECT TOP (10) wait_type
    FROM collect.wait_stats
    WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY wait_type
    ORDER BY MAX(wait_time_ms) DESC
),
wait_rates AS (
    SELECT
        ws.collection_time,
        ws.wait_type,
        ws.wait_time_ms_delta,
        interval_seconds = DATEDIFF(SECOND,
            LAG(ws.collection_time) OVER (PARTITION BY ws.wait_type ORDER BY ws.collection_time),
            ws.collection_time)
    FROM collect.wait_stats AS ws
    WHERE ws.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ws.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND ws.wait_type IN (SELECT wait_type FROM top_waits)
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), collection_time),
    metric = wait_type,
    value = CASE
        WHEN interval_seconds > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(18,4), CAST(wait_time_ms_delta AS decimal(19,4)) / interval_seconds)
        ELSE 0
    END
FROM wait_rates
WHERE wait_time_ms_delta >= 0
ORDER BY collection_time;
SELECT tw.wait_type, wait_seconds = CONVERT(float, tw.wait_time_sec) FROM report.top_waits_last_hour AS tw ORDER BY tw.wait_time_ms DESC;

panels.title: Signal vs resource wait ms/sec (CPU pressure indicator)

targets.rawSql:
WITH agg AS (
    SELECT
        ws.collection_time,
        signal_ms = SUM(ws.signal_wait_time_ms_delta),
        resource_ms = SUM(ws.wait_time_ms_delta) - SUM(ws.signal_wait_time_ms_delta)
    FROM collect.wait_stats AS ws
    WHERE ws.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ws.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY ws.collection_time
),
timed AS (
    SELECT
        collection_time,
        signal_ms,
        resource_ms,
        interval_seconds = DATEDIFF(SECOND,
            LAG(collection_time) OVER (ORDER BY collection_time),
            collection_time)
    FROM agg
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), collection_time),
    signal_wait_ms_sec = CONVERT(decimal(18,4), CAST(signal_ms AS decimal(19,4)) / interval_seconds),
    resource_wait_ms_sec = CONVERT(decimal(18,4), CAST(resource_ms AS decimal(19,4)) / interval_seconds)
FROM timed
WHERE interval_seconds > 0
ORDER BY collection_time;

WITH top_waits AS (
    SELECT TOP (10) wait_type
    FROM collect.wait_stats
    WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY wait_type
    ORDER BY MAX(wait_time_ms) DESC
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ws.collection_time),
    metric = ws.wait_type,
    value = ws.waiting_tasks_count
FROM collect.wait_stats AS ws
WHERE ws.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ws.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND ws.wait_type IN (SELECT wait_type FROM top_waits)
ORDER BY ws.collection_time;

value.title: Drill down: queries with this wait

targets.rawSql: SELECT tw.wait_type, tw.wait_time_ms, wait_time_sec = CONVERT(decimal(19,2), tw.wait_time_sec), tw.waiting_tasks, tw.signal_wait_ms, tw.resource_wait_ms, tw.avg_wait_ms_per_task, tw.last_seen FROM report.top_waits_last_hour AS tw ORDER BY tw.wait_time_ms DESC;

SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ts.collection_time), user_objects = ts.user_object_reserved_mb, internal_objects = ts.internal_object_reserved_mb, version_store = ts.version_store_reserved_mb, unallocated = ts.unallocated_mb FROM collect.tempdb_stats AS ts WHERE ts.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ts.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY ts.collection_time;

SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ts.collection_time), sessions_using_tempdb = ts.total_sessions_using_tempdb, top_consumer_mb = ts.top_task_total_mb FROM collect.tempdb_stats AS ts WHERE ts.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ts.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY ts.collection_time;

SELECT
    tca.collection_time,
    user_objects_mb = tca.user_object_reserved_mb,
    internal_objects_mb = tca.internal_object_reserved_mb,
    version_store_mb = tca.version_store_reserved_mb,
    total_mb = tca.total_reserved_mb,
    unallocated_mb = tca.unallocated_mb,
    sessions_in_tempdb = tca.total_sessions_using_tempdb,
    top_session_id = tca.top_task_session_id,
    top_session_mb = tca.top_task_total_mb,
    pagelatch_up_ms = tca.pagelatch_up_ms,
    pagelatch_ex_ms = tca.pagelatch_ex_ms,
    alloc_extent_cache_ms = tca.alloc_extent_cache_ms,
    tca.contention_level,
    tca.recommendation
FROM report.tempdb_contention_analysis AS tca;

panels.title: IO latency per file (top 10 by volume)

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_files AS (
    SELECT TOP (10)
        fio.database_name,
        fio.file_name,
        fio.file_type_desc
    FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
    WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
        AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
    GROUP BY fio.database_name, fio.file_name, fio.file_type_desc
    HAVING SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) DESC
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), fio.collection_time),
    metric = fio.database_name + N' ' + fio.file_type_desc + N' read',
    value = CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0) > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(19,2), fio.io_stall_read_ms_delta * 1.0 / fio.num_of_reads_delta)
        ELSE 0
    END
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
JOIN top_files AS tf ON tf.database_name = fio.database_name AND tf.file_name = fio.file_name
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
    AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
ORDER BY fio.collection_time;

WITH top_files AS (
    SELECT TOP (10)
        fio.database_name,
        fio.file_name,
        fio.file_type_desc
    FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
    WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
        AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
    GROUP BY fio.database_name, fio.file_name, fio.file_type_desc
    HAVING SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) DESC
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), fio.collection_time),
    metric = fio.database_name + N' ' + fio.file_type_desc + N' write',
    value = CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0) > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(19,2), fio.io_stall_write_ms_delta * 1.0 / fio.num_of_writes_delta)
        ELSE 0
    END
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
JOIN top_files AS tf ON tf.database_name = fio.database_name AND tf.file_name = fio.file_name
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
    AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
ORDER BY fio.collection_time;

WITH top_files AS (
    SELECT TOP (10)
        fio.database_name,
        fio.file_name,
        fio.file_type_desc
    FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
    WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
        AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
    GROUP BY fio.database_name, fio.file_name, fio.file_type_desc
    HAVING SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) DESC
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), fio.collection_time),
    metric = fio.database_name + N' ' + fio.file_type_desc + N' read_queued',
    value = CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0) > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(19,2), ISNULL(fio.io_stall_queued_read_ms_delta, 0) * 1.0 / fio.num_of_reads_delta)
        ELSE 0
    END
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
JOIN top_files AS tf ON tf.database_name = fio.database_name AND tf.file_name = fio.file_name
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
    AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
ORDER BY fio.collection_time;

WITH top_files AS (
    SELECT TOP (10)
        fio.database_name,
        fio.file_name,
        fio.file_type_desc
    FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
    WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
        AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
    GROUP BY fio.database_name, fio.file_name, fio.file_type_desc
    HAVING SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) DESC
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), fio.collection_time),
    metric = fio.database_name + N' ' + fio.file_type_desc + N' write_queued',
    value = CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0) > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(19,2), ISNULL(fio.io_stall_queued_write_ms_delta, 0) * 1.0 / fio.num_of_writes_delta)
        ELSE 0
    END
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
JOIN top_files AS tf ON tf.database_name = fio.database_name AND tf.file_name = fio.file_name
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
    AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
ORDER BY fio.collection_time;

SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), fio.collection_time),
    read_mb_sec = SUM(CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(fio.sample_ms_delta, 0) > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(19,4), fio.num_of_bytes_read_delta * 1000.0 / fio.sample_ms_delta / 1048576.0)
        ELSE 0
    END),
    write_mb_sec = SUM(CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(fio.sample_ms_delta, 0) > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(19,4), fio.num_of_bytes_written_delta * 1000.0 / fio.sample_ms_delta / 1048576.0)
        ELSE 0
    END)
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
GROUP BY fio.collection_time
ORDER BY fio.collection_time;

panels.title: IO read/write counts per file (top 10 by volume)

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_files AS (
    SELECT TOP (10)
        fio.database_name,
        fio.file_name,
        fio.file_type_desc
    FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
    WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
        AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
    GROUP BY fio.database_name, fio.file_name, fio.file_type_desc
    HAVING SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) DESC
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), fio.collection_time),
    metric = fio.database_name + N' ' + fio.file_type_desc + N' reads',
    value = CONVERT(float, ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0))
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
JOIN top_files AS tf ON tf.database_name = fio.database_name AND tf.file_name = fio.file_name
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
    AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
ORDER BY fio.collection_time;

WITH top_files AS (
    SELECT TOP (10)
        fio.database_name,
        fio.file_name,
        fio.file_type_desc
    FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
    WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
        AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
    GROUP BY fio.database_name, fio.file_name, fio.file_type_desc
    HAVING SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_reads_delta, 0)) + SUM(ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0)) DESC
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), fio.collection_time),
    metric = fio.database_name + N' ' + fio.file_type_desc + N' writes',
    value = CONVERT(float, ISNULL(fio.num_of_writes_delta, 0))
FROM collect.file_io_stats AS fio
JOIN top_files AS tf ON tf.database_name = fio.database_name AND tf.file_name = fio.file_name
WHERE fio.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND fio.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND fio.database_name IS NOT NULL
    AND fio.database_name <> N'tempdb'
ORDER BY fio.collection_time;

SELECT
    fil.database_name,
    file_type = fil.file_type,
    fil.file_name,
    avg_read_ms = fil.avg_read_latency_ms,
    avg_write_ms = fil.avg_write_latency_ms,
    reads_15min = fil.reads_last_15min,
    writes_15min = fil.writes_last_15min,
    fil.latency_issue,
    fil.recommendation
FROM report.file_io_latency AS fil
WHERE fil.reads_last_15min > 0 OR fil.writes_last_15min > 0
ORDER BY
    CASE fil.latency_issue
        WHEN N'CRITICAL - Read latency > 50ms' THEN 0
        WHEN N'CRITICAL - Write latency > 100ms' THEN 1
        WHEN N'HIGH - Read latency > 20ms' THEN 2
        WHEN N'HIGH - Write latency > 50ms' THEN 3
        ELSE 9
    END;

SELECT
    fiwc.database_name,
    file_type = fiwc.file_type_desc,
    fiwc.file_name,
    avg_read_ms = fiwc.avg_read_latency_ms,
    avg_write_ms = fiwc.avg_write_latency_ms,
    fiwc.total_reads,
    fiwc.total_writes,
    pageiolatch_sh_ms = fiwc.pageiolatch_sh_ms,
    pageiolatch_ex_ms = fiwc.pageiolatch_ex_ms,
    writelog_ms = fiwc.writelog_ms,
    fiwc.latency_concern,
    fiwc.recommendation
FROM report.file_io_wait_correlation AS fiwc
ORDER BY
    CASE fiwc.latency_concern
        WHEN N'CRITICAL - Read > 50ms' THEN 0
        WHEN N'CRITICAL - Write > 100ms' THEN 1
        ELSE 9
    END;

SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ps.collection_time), metric = RTRIM(ps.object_name) + N' • ' + RTRIM(ps.counter_name) + CASE WHEN ps.instance_name = N'' THEN N'' ELSE N' (' + RTRIM(ps.instance_name) + N')' END, value = CONVERT(float, ps.cntr_value_per_second) FROM collect.perfmon_stats AS ps WHERE ps.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ps.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND ps.cntr_value_per_second IS NOT NULL AND ps.cntr_value_per_second >= 0 AND RTRIM(ps.counter_name) IN (${counter:sqlstring}) ORDER BY ps.collection_time;

SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ss.collection_time), total = ss.total_sessions, running = ss.running_sessions, sleeping = ss.sleeping_sessions, waiting_for_memory = ss.sessions_waiting_for_memory FROM collect.session_stats AS ss WHERE ss.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ss.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY ss.collection_time;

WITH top_latches AS (
    SELECT TOP (10) latch_class
    FROM collect.latch_stats
    WHERE collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    GROUP BY latch_class
    ORDER BY MAX(wait_time_ms) DESC
)
SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ls.collection_time),
    metric = ls.latch_class,
    value = CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(ls.sample_interval_seconds, 0) > 0
        THEN CONVERT(decimal(18,4), CAST(ls.wait_time_ms_delta AS decimal(19,4)) / ls.sample_interval_seconds)
        ELSE 0
    END
FROM collect.latch_stats AS ls
WHERE ls.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ls.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND ls.latch_class IN (SELECT latch_class FROM top_latches)
ORDER BY ls.collection_time;

SELECT TOP (200)
    ls.collection_id,
    ls.collection_time,
    ls.server_start_time,
    ls.latch_class,
    ls.waiting_requests_count,
    ls.wait_time_ms,
    ls.max_wait_time_ms,
    ls.waiting_requests_count_delta,
    ls.wait_time_ms_delta,
    ls.max_wait_time_ms_delta,
    ls.sample_interval_seconds
FROM collect.latch_stats AS ls
WHERE ls.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ls.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY ls.collection_time DESC, ls.wait_time_ms DESC;

SELECT TOP (200)
    ss.collection_id,
    ss.collection_time,
    ss.server_start_time,
    ss.spinlock_name,
    ss.collisions,
    ss.spins,
    ss.spins_per_collision,
    ss.sleep_time,
    ss.backoffs,
    ss.collisions_delta,
    ss.spins_delta,
    ss.sleep_time_delta,
    ss.backoffs_delta,
    ss.sample_interval_seconds
FROM collect.spinlock_stats AS ss
WHERE ss.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ss.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY ss.collection_time DESC, ss.spins DESC;
